---
name: simplify
input: $file, $n
---

# Simplify

Iteratively simplify the code in $file without changing its behaviour: each
iteration diverges along three heuristics and selects, and a fresh-context
judge picks the best iteration at the end.

$heuristics = ["make it more direct", "make it more obvious", "make it smaller"]
$code = the contents of $file
$iterations = []

FOR $i IN [1 .. $n]
  $simplified = USE ~/skills/map-reduce
  WITH
    worker: general
    items: $heuristics
    map: Simplify this code, pushing in one direction: {$item}. Preserve the module's behaviour and public interface exactly; its test suite must still pass. Return the complete revised file, nothing else. Code: {$code}
    reduce: Pick the candidate that most improves the code, or merge two if they compose cleanly: simpler, clearer, behaviour unchanged. Return one file.
  Append $simplified to $iterations
  $code = $simplified
END

$winner = SPAWN general
WITH
  instruction: Compare these versions of the same module and return the best one: the simplest version that is still clear, complete, and behaviour-preserving. The winner need not be the last.
  iterations: $iterations

RETURN $winner

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  locale?: string;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;

export class PricingFacade {
  private vatRate: number;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let total = 0;
    let quantity = 0;

    for (const item of order.items) {
      total += item.unitPrice * item.quantity;
      quantity += item.quantity;
    }

    if (quantity >= 10) total *= 0.9;
    if (order.loyaltyMember) total *= 0.95;

    return Math.round(total * (1 + this.vatRate) * 100) / 100;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order): number {
  return new PricingFacade().price(order);
}

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * rounding.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  locale?: string;
}

const DEFAULT_PRICING_OPTIONS: Required<PricingOptions> = {
  vatRate: 0.2,
  roundingMode: "half-up",
  locale: "en-GB",
};

class PriceCalculator {
  constructor(private options: Required<PricingOptions>) {}

  calculate(order: Order): number {
    const subtotal = this.calculateSubtotal(order);
    const discounted = this.applyDiscounts(order, subtotal);
    const withTax = this.addTax(discounted);
    return this.round(withTax);
  }

  private calculateSubtotal(order: Order): number {
    let total = 0;
    for (const item of order.items) {
      total += item.unitPrice * item.quantity;
    }
    return total;
  }

  private applyDiscounts(order: Order, subtotal: number): number {
    let result = subtotal;

    // Bulk discount: 10% off for 10+ items
    const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
    if (totalQuantity >= 10) {
      result *= 0.9;
    }

    // Loyalty discount: 5% off for loyalty members
    if (order.loyaltyMember) {
      result *= 0.95;
    }

    return result;
  }

  private addTax(discounted: number): number {
    return discounted * (1 + this.options.vatRate);
  }

  private round(value: number): number {
    return Math.round(value * 100) / 100;
  }
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private calculator: PriceCalculator;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.calculator = new PriceCalculator({
      ...DEFAULT_PRICING_OPTIONS,
      ...(options ?? {}),
    });
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    return this.calculator.calculate(order);
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order): number {
  return new PricingFacade().price(order);
}

 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  locale?: string;
}

  vatRate: 0.2,
  roundingMode: "half-up",
  locale: "en-GB",
};

function resolveOptions(options?: PricingOptions): Required<PricingOptions> {
  return { ...DEFAULT_PRICING_OPTIONS, ...(options ?? {}) };
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: Required<PricingOptions>;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {

    const subtotal = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0);

    // Calculate total quantity for bulk discount

    if (totalQuantity >= 10) {

      total *= 0.95; // Loyalty discount
    }

    // Apply tax and round
    total *= 1 + this.options.vatRate;
    return Math.round(total * 100) / 100;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order): number {
  return new PricingFacade().price(order);

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;

  quantity: number;

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

  items: OrderItem[];

    const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
    if (totalQuantity >= 10) {

    // Apply loyalty discount (5% off for members)
    if (order.loyaltyMember) {
      amount *= 0.95;
    }

    // Add VAT and round to 2 decimal places
    amount = amount * (1 + this.vatRate);
    return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;

function calculateSubtotal(items: OrderItem[]): number {
  let subtotal = 0;
  for (const item of items) {
    subtotal += item.unitPrice * item.quantity;
  }
  return subtotal;
}

function applyBulkDiscount(amount: number, items: OrderItem[]): number {
  const totalQuantity = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
  return totalQuantity >= 10 ? amount * 0.9 : amount;
}

function applyLoyaltyDiscount(amount: number, isLoyaltyMember: boolean): number {
  return isLoyaltyMember ? amount * 0.95 : amount;
}

function applyVatAndRound(amount: number, vatRate: number): number {
  const withVat = amount * (1 + vatRate);
  return Math.round(withVat * 100) / 100;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private vatRate: number;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let amount = calculateSubtotal(order.items);
    amount = applyBulkDiscount(amount, order.items);
    amount = applyLoyaltyDiscount(amount, order.loyaltyMember);
    amount = applyVatAndRound(amount, this.vatRate);
    return amount;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order): number {
  return new PricingFacade().price(order);
}
